meaning: n.[医]发育异常 发育不良,(由发育异常形成的)异常结构
examples: Fetal brain cell damage that phenomenon, would lead to fetal body dysplasia.
Conclusions: Hip instability is increased in proportion to the degree of dysplasia.
The most likely cause of sphenoid dysplasia is defective ossification of the sphenoid bone.
He fought through paralysis and hip dysplasia, and had to learn how to walk again.
The most serious cause that I have seen is dysplasia of the pancreatic duct.
